# Harshini Murugadoss

> AI Engineer with an MS in Robotics (AI & Perception) from UC Riverside (GPA 3.97/4.0).
> Ships production RAG pipelines and runs LLM red-teaming/security assessments. Open to
> AI Engineer, Forward Deployed Engineer, and AI Security roles. Based in Milpitas,
> California.

## Current Role
AI Operations Engineer at Enkrypt AI (May 2026 - present) - leads red-teaming
engagements for enterprise LLM customers, builds AI security education content.

## Key Projects
- ScholarStream: production RAG pipeline over arXiv papers. Hybrid BM25+KNN search,
  agentic LangGraph routing, 150-400x speedup via Redis semantic caching.
  https://github.com/harshini1331/ScholarStream
- VeriTrace: fully offline, privacy-first RAG compliance auditor. Llama 3, Ollama,
  ChromaDB.
- Career Compass: multilingual AI career guidance platform serving 100+ students
  across 7 Indian states, built at India Literacy Project. React 18, TypeScript,
  FastAPI, PostgreSQL.

## Skills
Python, FastAPI, LangChain, LangGraph, RAG, LLM Security, AI Red Teaming, NVIDIA
Triton, Docker, React, TypeScript, PyTorch, TensorFlow.
